owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

refundFailedSwapAndUnwrapUniversal(uint2.details: When swap fails in _swapBackAndRefund, the intermediary token amount is saved in failedSwapAndUnwrapRefundReqs.      This function allows admin to swap the intermediary token back to input token and refund it to the user.

params._inputToken: Input token address that the user originally sent
params._pathFromIntermediaryToInputOnSourceChai: Swap path from intermediary token to input token on source chain
params._refundAddress: Address to receive the input token (user's address)
params._uniqueCounter: Unique counter from the original swap and unwrap universal request

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._targetChainConnectorProxy: Address of the target chain connector proxy

params._destinationToken: Address of the token on the target chain
params._sourceToken: Address of the token on the current chain

swapAndUnwrap(address,address,uint256[],.details: To find teleBTCAmount, _bridgePercentageFee should be reduced from the inputTokenAmount

params._exchangeConnector: Address of exchange connector to be used
params._path: of exchanging inputToken to teleBTC (these are Polygon token addresses, so _path[0] != _token)
params._token: Address of input token (on the current chain)

params._exchangeConnector: Address of exchange connector to be used on the intermediary chain
params._isInputFixed: Whether the input token amount is fixed
params._refundAddress: Address to receive the input token in case of failure (user's address)

swapBackAndRefundBTCByAdmin((address,add.details: When a wrap and swap fails on this chain, admin can call this to send a cross-chain message      to the intermediary chain (eg. polygon) to swap the intermediary token to TeleBTC and unwrap to BTC

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

emergencyWithdraw(address,address,uint25.notice: Withdraw tokens in the emergency case

handleV3AcrossMessage(address,uint256,ad.notice: Process requests coming from Ethereum (using Across V3)

refundFailedSwapAndUnwrapUniversal(uint2.notice: Allows admin to swap failed swap back and refund requests and send input token to user

setOutputTokenDecimalsOnDestinationChain.notice: Setter for input token decimals on destination chain

swapAndUnwrapUniversal((address[],uint25.notice: Request exchanging token for BTC using universal route

swapBackAndRefundBTCByAdmin((address,add.notice: Called by admin to swap failed wrap and swap request to teleBTC and refund BTC to user
